Schema delta: Tenant +arcgisBoundaryUrl/arcgisBoundaryOutfields (both nullable String, encrypted at app layer per earthrangerUrl precedent, plain TEXT in DB); Event +areaName/areaBoundaryId FK to AreaBoundary SET NULL/areaDerivedAt (all nullable) + areaBoundary AreaBoundary? relation + @@index([tenantId, areaBoundaryId]) composite; Patrol same 3 fields + same relation + same composite index; AreaBoundary +events Event[] +patrols Patrol[] back-relations. Migration 20260520010000_add_area_attribution_and_tenant_arcgis: 7-step additive DDL (ALTER tenants/events/patrols ADD COLUMN + AddForeignKey events_area_boundary_id_fkey + AddForeignKey patrols_area_boundary_id_fkey + 2 CreateIndex composites) + lossless 7-step down.sql (DropIndex → DropConstraint → DropColumn in reverse dependency order). All additive nullable — no backfill needed, no data-migration risk; fields stay NULL until Batch 5+ derivation algorithm lands. Plan correction caught against v2 spec L456+L463: STATE.md plan listed only `area_boundary_id + area_derived_at` for Event/Patrol — v2 spec also requires `area_name` (free-text on Event from ER, free-text on Patrol "primary area" derived from objective or start_location's nearest AreaBoundary). Added area_name per the same "v2 spec is authoritative" correction pattern caught in 4.1d. Note: areaName on Event already pre-existed in packages/shared/src/types/event.ts + schemas/event.ts (latent shared/Prisma drift) — 4.1e resolves the drift by adding it to the Prisma schema. Shared package: 6 files edited additive only — types/{event,patrol,tenant}.ts + schemas/{event,patrol,tenant}.ts (areaBoundaryId as z.string().cuid().nullable(), areaDerivedAt as z.coerce.date().nullable(), arcgisBoundaryUrl as z.string().url().nullable() matching earthrangerUrl pattern, arcgisBoundaryOutfields as z.string().nullable()). Routers UNTOUCHED — apps/web/src/server/trpc/routers/event.ts + patrol.ts both use `include` (not `select`) on Event/Patrol queries so new schema fields auto-surface in responses with zero router code change (major scope simplification vs initial brief estimate). Tests: NEW apps/web/src/server/trpc/routers/__tests__/patrol.test.ts (6 cases mirroring event.test.ts mock pattern — list happy with null area fields, list happy with populated area fields, getById with area fields for matching tenant, getById null for cross-tenant patrol, FORBIDDEN guard when tenantId absent, stats counts grouped by state scoped to tenant) — closes existing gap as patrol router previously had zero coverage. POST-BATCH-4 DEFERRED WORK — Batch 5+ roadmap
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

  HIGH-VALUE LOOP CLOSERS (close the loop on Batch 4 foundations):
  - AreaBoundary derivation algorithm + re-derive BullMQ job + manual rebuild button (Batch 5)
    → Populates Event/Patrol area_boundary_id + area_derived_at via name match OR nearest-boundary lookup
  - PatrolTrack Materialization job (per-patrol GPS track fetch from ER + cache layer) (Batch 5)
    → Populates PatrolTrack rows via the materializePatrolTrack stub
  - ReportExport BullMQ pdf-render queue + marine-guardian-pdf-renderer Docker service (Puppeteer + Chromium) + /[tenantId]/exports/[id]/download streaming Route Handler (Batch 5)
    → Closes the loop on 4.1c reportExport.create (currently inserts queued row, no enqueue)
  - Notification fan-out flow (one alert → N NotificationRecipient rows) — Batch 5+ AlertRule restructure
  - Email dispatch worker (flips emailStatus pending→sent/suppressed_by_cooldown/digested/failed) — Batch 5+
  - Read-at rendering in UI ("Read 2 hours ago" using NotificationRecipient.readAt) — Batch 6+ UI polish

  BREAKING MIGRATIONS (need coordinated UI + downstream code updates):
  - Event.priority Int→enum (critical|high|medium|low) + UI updates (Batch 5+)
  - Event.state `new_event`→`new` rename + downstream refs (Batch 5+)
  - Patrol.state enum expansion (open|scheduled|active|done|cancelled|draft) (Batch 5+)
  - AlertRule restructure (kind/condition_json/recipients_json/channels/cooldown_minutes) (Batch 6+)
  - Tenant sync-engine fields (active_check_interval_seconds + 14 others) — Batch 6+
  - AuditLog impersonation fields (acting_user_id/impersonated_as_tenant_id/severity/user_agent) — Batch 7+
  - User.fullName → User.name rename (mechanical refactor, opportunistic)
  - SyncLog enum additions (subject_groups, tracks) — pull alongside related sync work
  - Subject.region/sex column extraction — pull from additional_json when Subject sync refactor lands

  USER-VISIBLE FEATURES (Batch 6+ once foundations + derivations are in):
  - Area Boundary Management UI (Batch 6+)
  - Patrol Coverage Report (Pages 1-3 using area_boundary_id + PatrolTrack) (Batch 6+)
  - Per Area Report at /[tenant]/reports/area (Batch 6+)
  - Sync Health page (Batch 6+)
  - FuelEntry UI page + receipt photo upload to MinIO (Batch 6+)
  - FuelEntry analytics aggregation (SUM(liters) per area per range, L/km KPI math per spec §182) (Batch 6+)
  - NotificationRecipient retention policy enforcement (1y per spec L645) — Batch 7+

  ONCE ALL DEFERRED WORK SHIPS: swap docs/v2/PRODUCT.md → canonical docs/PRODUCT.md (mechanical swap, no code changes).
